name: Mad Frost
short_description: Mad Frost - 2D platformer with puzzle elements. In it, you have to go through a world drawn on squared paper. A world full of adventures and unexpected encounters. And our hero is waiting for the holidays like no one else. But not everything is so smooth...
detailed_description:
Welcome to the world sketched on squared paper. The world full of adventures and unexpected meetings. Holidays are just around the corner! And our hero is waiting for them so much. But everything is not as simple as it seems...

Somebody has made a decision on no presents this year, but obviously you can't agree with it! Reach the "villain"'s lair and make things right.

Mad Frost is a platformer with the elements of a puzzle.

A sketched story is waiting for you! Each object including the main character is sketched on squared paper, taken a photo of and made alive with the help of Unity. Hundreds of paper sheets, dozens of writing and sketching materials. Everything is for you to enjoy the game.

Are you ready to save the holidays?
